caAdmin.title: CA Admin
caAdmin.blurb: Re-design of internal software used by the Customer Service team of CubiCasa
caAdmin.team: Me, Product Manager, Customer Support Team Lead
caAdmin.challenge: Re-design the in-house tool used by the CS team
caAdmin.goal: Improve the efficiency of the CS team member’s workflow
caAdmin.context: The brief that was given at the beginning of this task was the following: create a more unified interface, reduce the clicks, improve search function, integrating with other tools used by CS team, visual simplification of the UI
